entity.summary: Japan-focused crypto asset exchange service operated within the LINE group. LVC launched BITMAX on 2019-09-17 as a registered Japanese crypto-asset exchange accessible through the LINE app. LINE Xenesis later announced that LINE BITMAX would end on 2026-06-01 and that the company would discontinue its crypto-asset exchange business. The service site and help center now state that the service ended on that date.
entity.notes: This is LINE's Japan-market BITMAX service, not the unrelated BitMax.io / AscendEX exchange. death_reason is voluntary_shutdown because the operator formally chose to end the service while citing market changes, competition, and resource allocation.

events.title: BITMAX began operations in Japan
events.description: LVC Corporation announced that BITMAX had gone live for the Japanese market, initially through the Android version of the LINE app, after LVC registered as a cryptocurrency exchanger under Japan's Payment Services Act.
events.notes: The official LINE release provides the exact service-launch date and distinguishes BITMAX from the separate BITBOX service.

events.title: LINE Xenesis announced LINE BITMAX closure
events.description: LINE Xenesis announced that LINE BITMAX would end on 2026-06-01 and published withdrawal, asset-conversion, refund, and custody procedures for customers.
events.notes: The announcement states that the operator would also discontinue its crypto-asset exchange business.

events.title: LINE BITMAX service ended
events.description: LINE BITMAX reached its announced termination date. The official service site and help center subsequently displayed that the service had ended on 2026-06-01.
events.notes: Used as the terminal operational marker.

evidence.title: BITMAX Cryptocurrency Exchange for Japan Begins Operations
evidence.notes: Primary source for launch date, operator, Japanese-market scope, supported assets, and registration context.

evidence.title: LINE Crypto Asset LINK Launches on BITMAX Exchange
evidence.notes: Official retrospective confirmation that BITMAX launched on 2019-09-17 and operated through the LINE app in Japan.

evidence.title: LINE Xenesis announcement on termination of LINE BITMAX
evidence.notes: Primary corporate announcement for termination date and customer-asset handling.

evidence.title: LINE BITMAX official site after service termination
evidence.notes: Official site states that LINE BITMAX ended on 2026-06-01.

evidence.title: LINE BITMAX Help Center after service termination
evidence.notes: Official help center confirms that the service ended on 2026-06-01.
